content.headline: AI-Powered E‑Commerce That Converts & Scales
content.subtitle: From Shopify and WooCommerce to fully custom storefronts and marketplaces—we design, build, and optimize e‑commerce experiences that sell more, automate more, and scale with your brand.

sections.title: E‑Commerce Problems We Solve
sections.subtitle: Are these hurting your store?

problems.title: Low Conversion & High Cart Abandonment
problems.description: Traffic comes in but doesn’t convert. Confusing flows, slow pages, and broken checkout experiences sabotage your revenue.

problems.title: Fragile Tech Stack
problems.description: Plugins stacked on plugins, slow themes, and hacked-together integrations that break on every update or campaign.

problems.title: Manual, Repetitive Operations
problems.description: Order management, follow‑ups, inventory sync, and customer support done manually—stealing time from strategy and growth.

problems.title: No Single View of Customers
problems.description: Data is scattered across your store, ads manager, email tool, and spreadsheets—making it hard to segment, personalize, or forecast.

content.empathy_text: We get it. Running an e‑commerce business means juggling products, campaigns, ops, and support—often on tech that was never designed to scale. You need a store that sells on autopilot, not one that constantly needs fixing.

sections.title: Why DOTR for E‑Commerce?
sections.subtitle: The AI‑First Storefront Advantage

content.headline: Stores That Convert Better, Operate Smarter, and Scale Faster
supporting_points: End‑to‑end e‑commerce: strategy, UX, development, CRO, automation, and marketing in one place.
AI‑first—from product discovery and recommendations to support and retention, we bake intelligence into your store.
Modern stack: Shopify, WooCommerce, custom headless builds with Supabase, n8n, and AI assistants.
Conversion‑focused UX: fast, mobile‑first, and optimized checkouts instead of just “pretty” themes.
Built to scale: from first 100 orders to multi‑region catalogs, subscriptions, and marketplaces.

content.headline: Let’s Turn Your Store into a Growth Engine
content.description: Whether you’re launching from zero or scaling past your current stack, we’ll design, build, and automate an e‑commerce experience that sells more with less effort.

sections.title: E‑Commerce at DOTR
sections.subtitle: Part of a bigger AI‑first ecosystem

content.story: DOTR (Dhinoja OmniTech Resolutions) is an AI‑first digital solutions company. Our E‑Commerce pillar combines design, development, marketing, and automation to build stores that don’t just look good—they operate as intelligent revenue engines connected to the rest of your business.
content.mission: To build e‑commerce experiences that are fast, scalable, and deeply integrated with AI, so brands can focus on products and customers—not firefighting their tech stack.
content.vision: To be the go‑to partner for brands that want their store, marketing, and operations to feel like one unified, always‑on growth system.

sections.title: E‑Commerce Services FAQ
sections.subtitle: Your questions answered

items.question: Which platforms do you support?
items.answer: We work with Shopify, WooCommerce, and custom headless setups using modern stacks like React, Supabase, and n8n. We choose the right stack based on where you are now and where you want to go.

items.question: Can you migrate my existing store?
items.answer: Yes. We handle migrations from legacy platforms or between Shopify/WooCommerce, including products, customers, orders, and SEO‑sensitive URLs with minimal downtime.

items.question: How long does a typical project take?
items.answer: Most e‑commerce rebuilds or launches see a first version in 3–6 weeks, depending on catalog size and integrations. We’ll give you a clear timeline and milestones after discovery.

items.question: Do you also handle marketing and traffic?
items.answer: Absolutely. Our Marketing and Content pillars can run SEO, paid, social, and email for you, tightly integrated with your store, analytics, and automation stack.

items.question: Is everything editable without developers?
items.answer: Yes. We build modular sections and CMS‑driven layouts so your team can launch new landing pages, offers, and campaigns from the admin—no new deploys needed.

items.question: Can you support subscriptions and memberships?
items.answer: Yes. We design and implement subscription flows, membership areas, loyalty programs, and post‑purchase upsells optimized for retention and LTV.

content.headline: Ready to Scale Your E‑Commerce with AI?
content.description: Whether you need a new store, a smarter stack, or better conversions—we’ll help you turn your e‑commerce into a real growth engine.

content.pitch: We help ambitious brands build and scale e‑commerce experiences that convert more, automate more, and rely less on manual work—powered by AI, modern stacks, and a deep understanding of online retail.
content.tagline: Your products. Our AI‑powered e‑commerce engine. Revenue on repeat.

sections.title: The Cost of a Store That’s “Good Enough”
sections.subtitle: Then the solution

content.problem: Every month with a slow, leaky, or hard‑to‑change store silently burns ad spend, frustrates customers, and caps your growth.
content.agitation: You keep patching plugins, hacking together flows, and hoping the next theme or agency will fix it. Meanwhile, competitors investing in smarter stacks and AI‑driven experiences are widening the gap.
content.solution: DOTR helps you step off that treadmill. We design, build, and automate a conversion‑ready, AI‑first e‑commerce foundation that you can keep improving without rewrites or constant firefighting.
